source: Tasmania DPFEM Crime Statistics Supplement 2024-25 PDF

display.headline: Tasmania statewide crime context
display.summary: This file provides Tasmania-wide offence counts and clearance rates for the 2024-25 financial year. It is useful as a state-level context layer, not as suburb, SA2, or LGA crime data.

notes.method: Values transcribed from the Tasmania DPFEM Crime Statistics Supplement 2024-25.
notes.warning: This source is statewide only. It does not provide suburb, SA2, LGA, or police-district level breakdowns in the uploaded PDF.
notes.reference_period_note: Statistics are compiled according to the date an offence becomes known to police.
